message:
fix(messaging): certify_self_rebalance mut binding, jetstream JSON string unicode unescaping

Two messaging fixes:

1. **Fabric (fabric.rs)**: certify_self_rebalance test binding
   changed from `let certified` to `let mut certified` to allow
   subsequent mutation in the test body.

2. **JetStream JSON parser (jetstream.rs)**: extract_json_string_simple()
   was returning raw escape sequences (e.g. `\\u0020`) instead of
   their decoded values.  Now builds an unescaped result string,
   handling \\uXXXX (decoded via char::from_u32), \\n, \\t, \\r,
   \\\\/\\\", and pass-through for other escapes.
   Test renamed to test_extract_json_string_handles_unicode_escape
   and assertion updated to expect decoded `hello world` instead
   of the raw escape sequence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
